title: Random Mob Battle
description: Play a game with your friends or your community where you have to kill the most randomly generated mobs in a specified time!
body:
Battle against your friends in an epic battle in which you have a limited amount of time to kill randomly generated mobs! The player with the most mobs killed wins!

# Commands
## /startbattle
Starts the battle with the settings in the config file. Default is 1 hour long. Randomly generated mobs dont repeat eg you kill an iron golem and your next mob cant be an iron golem again.
## /skip
Every player has a certain amount of skips that he can use to skip the current mob and get a new one, this will not grant the player a point. (Skips can be configured in the config)
